title: Choose between three job offers
description: Compare three realistic job options under confirmed personal priorities.
time_horizon: One-time choice with an expected two-year stay
assumptions: All salary values are gross annual euros.
Criterion estimates are treated as independent in the MVP Monte Carlo model.
The minimum salary constraint applies conservatively to the full triangular salary range.
Weights and utility anchors have been reviewed and confirmed by the user.
notes: Example data is fictional and is not career advice.

criteria.name: Work-life balance
criteria.description: Expected sustainability of hours, flexibility, and recovery time.

criteria.name: Learning and growth
criteria.description: Expected opportunities to learn, gain responsibility, and improve future options.

criteria.name: Weekly commute time
criteria.description: Total expected commuting time per week.

hard_constraints.name: Minimum viable salary
hard_constraints.description: Every supported gross annual base salary must be at least EUR 50000.

alternatives.name: Stable corporation
alternatives.description: Established company with moderate growth and a hybrid commute.

alternatives.name: Remote startup
alternatives.description: Fully remote role with greater upside and uncertainty.

alternatives.name: Local nonprofit
alternatives.description: Mission-oriented local role with strong balance and lower salary.
